mapper.select: /* SQL ID : TermDAO.listTermByProf 설 명 : 교수자의 개설과목이 있는 학기 */ SELECT A.CRS_SMSTR_ID , MAX(A.SMSTRNM) AS SMSTRNM , MAX(A.DGRS_YR) AS DGRS_YR , MAX(A.DGRS_SMSTR) AS DGRS_SMSTR FROM CRS_SMSTR A JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.CRS_SMSTR_ID = B.CRS_SMSTR_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.USEYN = 'Y' AND ATNDLC_CERT_STSCD != 'CLOSE' AND C.SBJCT_ID IN ( SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' AND USER_ID IN ( SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE RPRSYN = 'Y' AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ) ) WHERE A.SMSTR_STSCD != 'WAIT' GROUP BY A.CRS_SMSTR_ID ORDER BY A.DGRS_YR DESC, CASE WHEN A.DGRS_SMSTR = 2 THEN 3 WHEN A.DGRS_SMSTR = 3 THEN 2 ELSE A.DGRS_SMSTR END DESC

/* SQL ID : TermDAO.selectTermByCrsCreCd 설 명 : 강의실의 학기 조회 */ SELECT A.CRS_SMSTR_ID , A.SMSTRNM , A.ORG_ID , A.GBNCD , A.DGRS_YR , A.DGRS_SMSTR , A.SMSTR_TYCD , A.OFLN_LRN_MNGYN , A.SMSTR_STSCD , A.SMSTR_DATA_LNKGYN , A.OP_SDTTM , A.OP_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_APLY_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_APLY_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_MOD_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_MOD_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_EDTTM , A.SCR_EVL_SDTTM , A.SCR_EVL_EDTTM , A.SCR_OPEN_SDTTM , A.SCR_OPEN_EDTTM , A.SCR_CALC_CTGRCD , A.MBL_ATNDC_USEYN , A.NOW_SMSTRYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM -- 강의시작일 설정된경우만 날짜 체크 , CASE WHEN A.OP_SDTTM IS NULL THEN 'Y' WHEN FN_DTTM() >= A.OP_SDTTM THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SVC_START_YN -- 복습기간 종료일 설정된경우만 날짜 체크 , CASE WHEN A.OP_EDTTM IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN FN_DTTM() >= A.OP_EDTTM THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SVC_END_YN FROM CRS_SMSTR A JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.CRS_SMSTR_ID = B.CRS_SMSTR_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}

/* SQL ID : TermDAO.select 설 명 : 학기 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.CRS_SMSTR_ID , A.SMSTRNM , A.ORG_ID , A.GBNCD , A.DGRS_YR , A.DGRS_SMSTR , A.SMSTR_TYCD , A.OFLN_LRN_MNGYN , A.SMSTR_STSCD , A.SMSTR_DATA_LNKGYN , A.OP_SDTTM , A.OP_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_APLY_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_APLY_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_MOD_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_MOD_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_EDTTM , A.SCR_EVL_SDTTM , A.SCR_EVL_EDTTM , A.SCR_OPEN_SDTTM , A.SCR_OPEN_EDTTM , A.SCR_CALC_CTGRCD , A.MBL_ATNDC_USEYN , A.NOW_SMSTRYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM CRS_SMSTR A WHERE A.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd}

/* SQL ID : TermDAO.selectUniTermByTermLink 설 명 : 오늘 날짜에 해당하는 학사연동 학기 정보 조회 */ SELECT CRS_SMSTR_ID , SMSTRNM FROM CRS_SMSTR WHERE OP_SDTTM <= DATE(NOW()) AND OP_EDTTM >= DATE(NOW()) AND UPPER(GBNCD) = 'UNI' AND SMSTR_DATA_LNKGYN = 'Y' AND ORG_ID = #{orgId} ORDER BY OP_SDTTM DESC LIMIT 1

/* SQL ID : TermDAO.selectCurrentTerm 설 명 : 현재 학기 조회 */
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SMSTR_CHRT_ID AS CRS_SMSTR_ID , ORG_ID , DGRS_YR AS HAKSA_YEAR , SMSTR_CHRTNM AS SMSTRNM , SMSTR_CHRT_GBNCD AS GBNCD , DGRS_SMSTR_CHRT AS DGRS_SMSTR , SMSTR_CHRT_TYCD AS SMSTR_TYCD , OFLN_LRN_MNGYN , SMSTR_CHRT_STSCD AS SMSTR_STSCD , SMSTR_CHRT_DATA_LNKGYN AS SMSTR_DATA_LNKGYN , MRK_OPEN_SDTTM AS OP_SDTTM , MRK_OPEN_EDTTM AS OP_EDTTM , ATNDLC_APLY_SDTTM , ATNDLC_APLY_EDTTM , ATNDLC_MOD_SDTTM , ATNDLC_MOD_EDTTM , ATNDLC_SDTTM , ATNDLC_EDTTM , MRK_EVL_SDTTM , MRK_EVL_EDTTM -- , MRK_CALC_CTGRCD , MBL_ATNDC_USEYN , NOW_SMSTRYN , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT WHERE NOW_SMSTRYN = 'Y' AND ORG_ID = #{orgId} ORDER BY CRS_SMSTR_ID ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

/* SQL ID : TermDAO.listPageing 설 명 : 학기 모든 목록 조회(비정규, 정규) */
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY OP_SDTTM DESC ) AS LINE_NO , A.CRS_SMSTR_ID AS TERM_CD , A.SMSTRNM AS TERM_NM , A.ORG_ID , A.DGRS_YR AS HAKSA_YEAR , A.DGRS_SMSTR AS HAKSA_TERM , ( CASE WHEN A.DGRS_SMSTR = '10' THEN '1학기' WHEN A.DGRS_SMSTR = '11' THEN '여름학기' WHEN A.DGRS_SMSTR = '20' THEN '2학기' WHEN A.DGRS_SMSTR = '21' THEN '겨울학기' ELSE '-' END ) AS HAKSA_TERM_NM , SMSTR_TYCD AS TERM_TYPE , A.OFLN_LRN_MNGYN AS OFF_LESSON_MGT_YN , A.SMSTR_STSCD AS TERM_STATUS , A.SMSTR_DATA_LNKGYN AS TERM_LINK_YN , A.OP_SDTTM AS SVC_START_DTTM , A.OP_EDTTM AS SVC_END_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_APLY_SDTTM AS ENRL_APLC_START_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_APLY_EDTTM AS ENRL_APLC_END_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_MOD_SDTTM AS ENRL_MOD_START_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_MOD_EDTTM AS ENRL_MOD_END_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_SDTTM AS ENRL_START_DTTM , A.ATNDLC_EDTTM AS ENRL_END_DTTM --, A.SCR_EVL_SDTTM --, A.SCR_EVL_EDTTM --, A.SCR_OPEN_SDTTM --, A.SCR_OPEN_EDTTM --, A.SCR_CALC_CTGRCD , A.MBL_ATNDC_USEYN AS MOBILE_ATTEND_YN , A.NOW_SMSTRYN AS CUR_TERM_YN , A.TERM_ORDER , A.TERM_ORDER2 --, A.CRS_COUNT FROM (SELECT TLT.ORG_SMSTR_COHORT_ID AS CRS_SMSTR_ID , TLT.SMSTR_COHORTNM AS SMSTRNM , TLT.ORG_ID , TLT.DGRS_YR , TLT.DGRS_SMSTR_COHORT AS DGRS_SMSTR -- , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND CTGRCD = 'DGRS_SMSTR' AND CD = TLT.DGRS_SMSTR) AS HAKSA_TERM_NM , TLT.SMSTR_COHORT_TYCD AS SMSTR_TYCD , TLT.OFLN_LRN_MNGYN , TLT.SMSTR_COHORT_STSCD AS SMSTR_STSCD , TLT.SMSTR_COHORT_DATA_LNKGYN AS SMSTR_DATA_LNKGYN , TLT.MRK_OPEN_SDTTM AS OP_SDTTM , TLT.MRK_OPEN_EDTTM AS OP_EDTTM , TLT.ATNDLC_APLY_SDTTM , TLT.ATNDLC_APLY_EDTTM , TLT.ATNDLC_MOD_SDTTM , TLT.ATNDLC_MOD_EDTTM , TLT.ATNDLC_SDTTM , TLT.ATNDLC_EDTTM --, TLT.SCR_EVL_SDTTM --, TLT.SCR_EVL_EDTTM --, TLT.SCR_OPEN_SDTTM --, TLT.SCR_OPEN_EDTTM --, TLT.SCR_CALC_CTGRCD , TLT.MBL_ATNDC_USEYN , TLT.NOW_SMSTRYN , ( CASE WHEN TLT.SMSTR_COHORT_STSCD ='SERVICE' THEN 1 WHEN TLT.SMSTR_COHORT_STSCD ='WAIT' THEN 2 WHEN TLT.SMSTR_COHORT_STSCD ='FINISH' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END ) AS TERM_ORDER , ( CASE WHEN TLT.SMSTR_COHORT_STSCD ='NORMAL' THEN 1 WHEN TLT.SMSTR_COHORT_STSCD ='BNORMAL' THEN 2 WHEN TLT.SMSTR_COHORT_STSCD ='OPEN' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END ) AS TERM_ORDER2 -- , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN WHERE TLT.CRS_SMSTR_ID = CRS_SMSTR_ID) AS CRS_COUNT FROM TB_LMS_ORG_SMSTR_COHORT TLT WHERE 1 = 1 AND TLT.SMSTR_TYCD = #{termType} AND TLT.SMSTR_STSCD = #{termStatus} AND TLT.DGRS_YR = #{haksaYear} AND TLT.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND LOWER(TLT.SMSTRNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) ) A ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : TermDAO.notEditCurTermYn 설 명 : */ UPDATE CRS_SMSTR SET NOW_SMSTRYN = 'N' , MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND CRS_SMSTR_ID IN (SELECT CRS_SMSTR_ID FROM (SELECT CRS_SMSTR_ID FROM CRS_SMSTR WHERE CRS_SMSTR_ID != #{termCd} AND ORG_ID = #{orgId}) AS TB_LMS_TERM_TERM )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : TermDAO.crsCurTermYnCheck 설 명 : 현재학기 변경 전에 이미 지정된 학기가 있는지 확인 */ SELECT COUNT(CRS_SMSTR_ID) AS COUNT FROM CRS_SMSTR WHERE NOW_SMSTRYN = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
/* SQL ID : TermDAO.insert 설 명 : 학기 정보 등록 */ INSERT INTO CRS_SMSTR ( CRS_SMSTR_ID , SMSTRNM , ORG_ID , DGRS_YR , DGRS_SMSTR , SMSTR_TYCD , OFLN_LRN_MNGYN , SMSTR_STSCD , SMSTR_DATA_LNKGYN
, OP_SDTTM
, OP_EDTTM
, ATNDLC_APLY_SDTTM
, ATNDLC_APLY_EDTTM
, ATNDLC_MOD_SDTTM
, ATNDLC_MOD_EDTTM
, ATNDLC_SDTTM
, ATNDLC_EDTTM
, SCR_EVL_SDTTM
, SCR_EVL_EDTTM
, SCR_OPEN_SDTTM
, SCR_OPEN_EDTTM
, RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{termCd} , #{termNm} , #{orgId} , #{haksaYear} , #{haksaTerm} , 'NORMAL' , 'N' , #{termStatus} , #{termLinkYn}
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{svcStartDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{svcEndDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{enrlAplcStartDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{enrlAplcEndDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{enrlModStartDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{enrlModEndDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{enrlStartDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{enrlEndDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{scoreEvalStartDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{scoreEvalEndDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{scoreOpenStartDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{scoreOpenEndDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{mdfrId} , FN_DTTM() )
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : TermDAO.termLessonSelect 설 명 : */
SELECT SMSTR_COHORT_SCHDL_ID AS TERM_CD , ATNDLC_TYCD AS ENRL_TYPE , TOC_SEQ AS LSN_ODR , SYMD AS START_DT , EYMD AS END_DT , LCTR_RCG_SYMD AS LT_DETM_FR_DT , LCTR_RCG_EYMD AS LT_DETM_TO_DT , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_SMSTR_COHORT_SCHDL WHERE SMSTR_COHORT_SCHDL_ID = #{termCd} AND ATNDLC_TYCD = #{enrlType} ORDER BY TOC_SEQ

/* SQL ID : TermDAO.selectCurTermLesson 설 명 : 학기 현재 주차 조회 */ SELECT A.CRS_SMSTR_ID , A.UNI_GBN , A.TOC_SEQ , A.LCTR_TYCD , A.SYMD , A.EYMD , A.LCTR_RCG_SYMD , A.LCTR_RCG_EYMD , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM CRS_SMSTR_WKNO A JOIN CRS_SMSTR B ON A.CRS_SMSTR_ID = B.CRS_SMSTR_ID AND B.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') BETWEEN A.SYMD AND A.EYMD AND A.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd} ORDER BY A.CRS_SMSTR_ID, A.TOC_SEQ DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
/* SQL ID : TermDAO.updateCreCrs 설 명 : 학기 정보 수정 시 개설과목에 관련 정보 반영 */
MERGE INTO TB_LMS_SBJCT T USING ( SELECT B.SBJCT_ID , A.ATNDLC_APLY_SDTTM /* 수강 신청 시작 일시 */ , A.ATNDLC_APLY_EDTTM /* 수강 신청 종료 일시 */ , A.ATNDLC_SDTTM /* 수강 시작 일시 */ , A.ATNDLC_EDTTM /* 수강 종료 일시 */ , A.SCR_EVL_SDTTM AS MRK_PROC_SDTTM /* 성적처리시작일시 */ , A.SCR_EVL_EDTTM AS MRK_PROC_EDTTM /* 성적처리종료일시 */ , #{mdfrId} AS MDFR_ID , FN_DTTM() AS MOD_DTTM FROM CRS_SMSTR A JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.CRS_SMSTR_ID = B.CRS_SMSTR_ID WHERE A.CRS_SMSTR_ID = #{termCd} ) S ON (S.SBJCT_ID = T.SBJCT_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.ATNDLC_APLY_SDTTM = S.ATNDLC_APLY_SDTTM , T.ATNDLC_APLY_EDTTM = S.ATNDLC_APLY_EDTTM , T.ATNDLC_SDTTM = S.ATNDLC_SDTTM , T.ATNDLC_EDTTM = S.ATNDLC_EDTTM , T.MRK_PROC_SDTTM = S.MRK_PROC_SDTTM , T.MRK_PROC_EDTTM = S.MRK_PROC_EDTTM , T.MDFR_ID = S.MDFR_ID , T.MOD_DTTM = S.MOD_DTTM
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : TermDAO.listCreYearByProfCourse 설 명 : 교수자의 개설과목이 있는 개설년도 */ SELECT DISTINCT C.SBJCT_ID AS DGRS_YR FROM CRS_SMSTR A JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.CRS_SMSTR_ID = B.CRS_SMSTR_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.USEYN = 'Y' AND C.SBJCT_ID IN ( SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE USER_ID IN ( SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' ) AND PROF_TYCD = 'PROFESSOR' ) ORDER BY C.SBJCT_ID DESC

/* SQL ID : TermDAO.selectTermByHaksa 설 명 : 학사년도, 학기별 학기 정보 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.CRS_SMSTR_ID) AS LINE_NO , A.CRS_SMSTR_ID , A.SMSTRNM , A.ORG_ID , A.GBNCD , A.DGRS_YR , A.DGRS_SMSTR , A.SMSTR_TYCD , A.OFLN_LRN_MNGYN , A.SMSTR_STSCD , A.SMSTR_DATA_LNKGYN , A.OP_SDTTM , A.OP_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_APLY_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_APLY_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_MOD_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_MOD_EDTTM , A.ATNDLC_SDTTM , A.ATNDLC_EDTTM , A.SCR_EVL_SDTTM , A.SCR_EVL_EDTTM , A.SCR_OPEN_SDTTM , A.SCR_OPEN_EDTTM , A.SCR_CALC_CTGRCD , A.MBL_ATNDC_USEYN , A.NOW_SMSTRYN , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM CRS_SMSTR A WHERE A.DGRS_YR = #{haksaYear} AND A.DGRS_SMSTR = #{haksaTerm} AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} ) A WHERE LINE_NO = 1
